candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: This appears directly beneath the selected total row 'Cost of goods sold' alongside other sub-components ('Personnel expenses in Cost of goods sold' and 'Cost of goods sold - Other'), indicating it is already embedded in the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level operating line to add.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Selling expenses
candidates.why: This is tied to selling expenses, not COGS, so it is not relevant to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: This is tied to administrative expenses, not COGS, so it is not relevant to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is the total 'Cost of goods sold'. The D&A row shown for COGS is a sub-component within that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Selling expenses
candidates.why: This appears directly beneath the selected parent row 'Selling expenses' and alongside other selling sub-components, so it looks already embedded in the selected selling expense total rather than a separate same-level line to add.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: This appears directly beneath the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses' and alongside other administrative sub-components, so it looks already embedded in the selected administrative expense total rather than a separate same-level line to add.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: This belongs to COGS, not the selected XSGA components bucket of selling plus administrative expenses.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. The visible D&A rows are nested sub-components of those selected totals, so separate addition would double count. There is no separate R&D expense row above operating profit, and XRD is empty.
